summary: Comprehensive testing of updated Solana Token Scanner completed. All functionality working perfectly with 100% backend success rate and excellent frontend performance.
passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (11/11 tests passed - 100% success rate)
All filter parameters working: min_volume, min_market_cap, max_market_cap, max_age_minutes, min_liquidity, max_transactions
/api/tokens/scan endpoint with all new filter criteria
Email subscription system (create, duplicate check, unsubscribe)
Filter criteria bar displaying all 7 filters correctly
Table columns: Token, Price, Age, 5m, 1h, 24h, Liquidity, MCap, Volume, TXNs, Links
Sort functionality on all sortable columns (Price, Age, Liquidity, MCap, Volume, TXNs)
Email subscription dialog with form validation
External links to DexScreener and Solscan
Professional UI styling with dark theme
Proper empty state handling ('No tokens match criteria' message)
All user interaction elements working smoothly
